# Vendored third-party code

## html5-qrcode.min.js

- Source: https://github.com/mebjas/html5-qrcode
- Version: 2.3.8
- License: Apache-2.0
- Fetched from: https://unpkg.com/html5-qrcode@2.3.8/html5-qrcode.min.js

Vendored (not loaded from a CDN) so the barcode scanner keeps working
offline and doesn't depend on a third-party CDN being up. Exposes
`Html5Qrcode` and `Html5QrcodeSupportedFormats` as globals.
